name: Chicken and Pasta Bake
recipeIngredient: 2 boneless chicken breasts -6 oz each; cut into cubes
4 oz blue cheese (gorgonzola or stilton); cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta in boiling salted water until tender.
2. In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the onion and garlic, cooking until softened.
3. Add the chicken cubes to the pan and fry until just browned on all sides.
4. Pour in the passata, tomatoes, olives, herbs, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
5. Allow the mixture to simmer gently for 5 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. Drain the cooked pasta and mix with the chicken mixture. Stir in half of the grated cheese.
7. Transfer the combined ingredients into an ovenproof dish. Sprinkle the remaining cheese on top.
8. Place under a preheated grill and bake for 10 minutes, or until the cheese has melted.
9. Serve immediately with a leafy green salad.
